message:
test(backup,plan): add 85 tests for helpers, schedule parsing, builders, and serde roundtrips

backup.rs: 59 new tests (18→77) covering BackupStats/ExportOptions/ImportOptions defaults,
sha256 known values, days_to_ymd edge cases (leap year, Y2K, Dec 31), format helpers,
parse_cron_field boundaries, BackupSchedule defaults/display_label/next_after, expand_tilde,
resolve_destination_root, unique_backup_path collisions, compare_backup_entries ordering,
dir_size, list_backup_entries edge cases, serde roundtrips for all result types.

plan.rs: 26 new tests (28→54) covering PlanId construction/serde/equality, IdempotencyKey
serde, StepPlan::with_key constructor, builder chains, Verification builders, add_steps,
empty plan validation, OnFailure variant constructors, nested plan canonical strings,
ApprovalScopeRef serde, paste_mode variations, and PlanValidationError Error trait impl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
